title: Yosys seems to be inconsistent with the original design.

features.name: empty_string_literal_cast_to_unsigned_in_shift
features.description: Code should include an expression where an empty string literal is cast to $unsigned and used in a shift operation

features.name: concatenation_output_width_mismatch
features.description: Code should include a concatenation assignment to a signal where the output width significantly exceeds the concatenated input widths
features.snippet:
output wire [(32'h1cf):(32'h0)] y;
assign y = {wire48, wire10, wire7, reg5, reg4, (1'h0)};

features.name: signed_negation_reg_to_smaller_wire
features.description: Code should include an assignment where a signed reg is negated and assigned to a signed wire of smaller width

features.name: bit_selection_with_non_constant_bounds
features.description: Code should include a bit selection using non-constant literal values as bounds
features.snippet:
reg signed [(3'h7):(1'h0)] reg4 = (1'h0);
assign wire10 = $signed(($unsigned("") >>> reg4[(1'h0):(1'h0)]));
